name: Open Charge Map API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary for the Open Charge Map API covering EV charging stations, connection types, operators, and related concepts

terms.label: Point of Interest
terms.definition: A charging station location entry in the Open Charge Map registry. Includes address, equipment details, connection types, operator information, and community data.

terms.label: Connection Type
terms.definition: The standard connector type used at a charging station (e.g., Type 2, CCS, CHAdeMO, Tesla). Defined by IEC standards.

terms.label: Charging Level
terms.definition: The power level of a charging station: Level 1 (under 2kW, 120V AC), Level 2 (over 2kW, 240V AC), or Level 3 (DC Fast Charge, over 40kW).

terms.label: Network Operator
terms.definition: The organization responsible for operating the EV charging station or network (e.g., ChargePoint, EVgo, Tesla Supercharger).

terms.label: Usage Type
terms.definition: Describes access restrictions for a charging station: Public, Private, Restricted (e.g., staff only), or Pay-at-location.

terms.label: Operational Status
terms.definition: The operational status of a charging station or individual connection: Operational, Temporarily Unavailable, Removed/Decommissioned, or Unknown.

terms.label: Address Information
terms.definition: The physical location details of a POI including street address, town, region, postcode, country, and geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude).

terms.label: Data Provider
terms.definition: The source organization that contributed or maintains the data for a charging station entry. May be OCM community, a national registry, or a charging network.

terms.label: User Check-In / Comment
terms.definition: Community-submitted status update or comment about a specific charging station, including check-in type, rating, and free-text comment.

terms.label: Media Item / Photo
terms.definition: A photo or image of a charging station submitted by a community member, linked to a specific POI.

terms.label: Core Reference Data
terms.definition: Lookup tables needed to decode numeric ID fields in POI results, including connection types, operators, countries, and status types.

terms.label: API Key
terms.definition: A unique key required to authenticate requests to the Open Charge Map API. Obtained via free registration at openchargemap.org.

terms.label: Compact Output Mode
terms.definition: An API response format where reference data is returned as numeric IDs rather than full objects, reducing response size. Used with compact=true parameter.

terms.label: Bounding Box
terms.definition: A geographic rectangle defined by (latitude1,longitude1,latitude2,longitude2) used to spatially filter charging station results.

terms.label: Open Data Flag
terms.definition: Indicates whether a charging station entry is covered by an open data license. Filter with opendata=true to retrieve only openly-licensed records.

terms.label: Supply Type
terms.definition: The electrical supply type of a connection: AC (single or three phase) or DC (direct current). Relevant for charger compatibility.

terms.label: Power in Kilowatts
terms.definition: The maximum power output of a charging connection in kilowatts (kW). Used to indicate charging speed.

terms.label: Check-in Status Type
terms.definition: Classification of a community check-in: e.g., 'All OK', 'Not Working', 'Under Repair', 'Equipment Mismatch'.
